tasks.label: Start local website
args: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%" && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\desktop-launcher.ps1

tasks.label: Stop local website
args: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%" && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stop-matsu-station.ps1

tasks.label: Check TypeScript
args: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%" && npm run lint

tasks.label: Build website
args: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%" && npm run ranger:build

tasks.label: Deploy website
args: set "PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%" && npm run ranger:deploy
